channel.title: Btc on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Btc on Archive 03

item.title: Bitcoin in the $70k Range: Who Is Buying?
item.description: Bitcoin ($BTC) is stuck in a $70,000 range. After a failed attempt to break $80,000, the market is moving sideways. While April saw $2.4 billion in ETF net inflows, long-term holder behavior remains mixed. We analyze whether this is an accumulation or a distribution phase.

item.title: Bitcoin in Flux: Where Will It Go by Year-End?
item.description: With Bitcoin showing mixed signals after hitting a new all-time high, the bullish (Kurumi) and cautious (Mikael) perspectives clash over the year-end price forecast. This post provides an in-depth analysis of two scenarios and investment strategies based on ETF fund flows, on-chain data, and macroeconomic variables.
